metadata.description: Claude Code skills for WordPress developers

plugins.name: wp-effort-estimation
plugins.description: Structured development-effort estimates for WordPress tasks (and React surfaces of WordPress — Gutenberg, Interactivity API, headless).

plugins.name: wp-migration-playbook
plugins.description: Opinionated, production-tested playbook for WordPress content migrations — WP→WP and other-system→WP.

plugins.name: wp-plugin-code-audit
plugins.description: Verification-first code audit for WordPress plugins: security, performance, standards, wp.org guidelines. Produces a markdown report with severity-sorted findings + GO / NO-GO / GO WITH FIXES verdict.

plugins.name: wp-mnemon
plugins.description: Deep architectural analysis of WordPress plugins — what the plugin does, how it works, what triggers what, and how data flows. 12-phase workflow with structured output.
